[化] 促黄体素
lh.d: n a gonadotropic hormone that is secreted by the anterior pituitary; stimulates ovulation in female mammals and stimulates androgen release in male mammals

lh rh.t: [化] 促黄体激素释放因子

lha.t: n. 由日本人编写的一种着名软件压缩工具

lhasa.t: n. 拉萨（中国西藏藏族自治区首府）
lhasa.d:
n. the sacred city of Lamaism; known as the Forbidden City for its former inaccessibility and hostility to strangers
n. a breed of terrier having a long heavy coat raised in Tibet as watchdogs

lhc.t: abbr. 液氢容器（Liquid Hydrogen Container ）

lhcs.t: abbr. long-haul communications system 长距离通信系统

lhd.t: abbr. （拉）古典文学博士（Litterarum Humaniorum Doctor, 等于Doctor of Humanities）；装载拖运倾卸作业（Load-Haul-Dump）

lhds.t: abbr. laser hole drilling system 激光钻孔系统

lhe.t: abbr. Lahore, Pakistan 巴基斯坦; Lagrange-Helmholtz equation 拉格朗日-亥姆霍兹方程; longitudinal Hall effect 纵向霍尔效应; latent hepatic encephalopathy 隐匿型肝性脑病

lhermitte's sign.t: [医] 莱尔米特氏征(见于多发性脑脊髓硬化,脊髓变性及颈髓损伤)

lhermitte-mcalpine syndrome.t: [医] 莱-麦二氏综合征(锥体及锥体外系统并发病)

lherzolite.d:
n. An igneous rock consisting largely of chrysolite, with
   pyroxene and picotite (a variety of spinel containing chromium).

lhp.t: [医][=late hyperpolarizing potential]迟发超极化电位

lhrh.t: (=luteinizing hormone releasing hormone)促性腺[激]素释放[激]素，黄体生成素释放激素

lhs.d: n. a gonadotropic hormone that is secreted by the anterior pituitary; stimulates ovulation in female mammals and stimulates androgen release in male mammals

lhv.t: abbr. liquid hydrogen vessel 液态氢容器; Low heat value 低热值，低发热量
